inputs.label: Number of Pomodoros
inputs.businessContext: How many pomodoro sessions you want to complete.

inputs.label: Work Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of one pomodoro work session.

inputs.label: Short Break Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of short break after each pomodoro, except before a long break.

inputs.label: Long Break Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of long break after completing a set of pomodoros.

inputs.label: Pomodoros Before Long Break
inputs.businessContext: Number of pomodoro sessions before a long break is taken.

inputs.label: Start Time (minutes from midnight)
inputs.businessContext: Time of day when you start the first pomodoro, in minutes from midnight (e.g., 8:00 AM = 480).
